subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Divine Threshold! For several years, our correspondence had been interrupted, and the cause of this discontinuation was this war [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان الهی سالهای چند بود که مخابره منقطع بود و سبب انقطاع اینحرب
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @consolation and comfort
